name: Sketchfab MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Sketchfab — the leading platform for 3D model publishing, discovery, and commerce. Enables AI agents to search Sketchfab's library of millions of 3D models, retrieve model metadata, download licensed models, and interact with Sketchfab's model ecosystem for 3D content pipeline automation.
use_cases: Searching and discovering 3D models from Sketchfab for 3D content pipeline agents
Retrieving 3D model metadata and download URLs from asset management agents
Finding appropriate 3D assets for game development or visualization agents
Automating 3D asset sourcing for creative production workflow agents
not_for: Creating or uploading 3D models to Sketchfab
Teams requiring specific CAD formats (Sketchfab provides GLTF/GLB/FBX)
Commercial use of Sketchfab models without verifying individual model licenses
best_when: A 3D artist, game developer, or visualization engineer wants AI agents to search and retrieve 3D models from Sketchfab's vast library — streamlining asset discovery and sourcing.
avoid_when: You need CAD-specific formats or proprietary 3D formats not available on Sketchfab. Also verify model licenses for commercial use.

auth.notes: Sketchfab API token or OAuth required. Sketchfab account needed. Some model downloads require appropriate license and account tier.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Many free CC-licensed models; Pro account for commercial downloads
pricing.paid_tiers: Sketchfab Pro ($15/month) for commercial usage and private models
pricing.notes: Sketchfab has free models (CC licensed) and paid models. MCP server is free open source. Review individual model licenses.

known_agent_gotchas: LICENSE RISK: Verify individual model licenses before commercial use — not all models are freely usable
Model download URLs may be time-limited — implement fresh URL retrieval before download
Community MCP — verify against current Sketchfab API version
3D model file sizes can be large — implement size limits for agent downloads
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS to Sketchfab API. API token authentication. Model licenses vary — commercial use requires license verification. GDPR compliant.

security_score_components.security_notes: API token authentication. License compliance required for commercial use. GDPR compliant.
